Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 17.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag set to 21.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures strict adherence to JDK 21 API availability, replacing older source/target flags.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta XML Bind API dependency to replace removed Java EE JAXB APIs in JDK 21.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB APIs were removed from the JDK module system in JDK 11 and are not present in JDK 21; code using them will fail with NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors without the explicit dependency.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta XML Bind implementation dependency (jaxb-impl) to provide runtime support for JAXB.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The API alone is insufficient; the implementation is required at runtime to prevent NoClassDefFoundError when JAXB is used.
